titleStmt.title: SII 29.66: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 66. (A.R. No. 65 of 1961-62.) KOLANUPĀKA, BHUVANAGIRI TALUK, NALGONDA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Another pillar in the Sōmēśvara temple, Museum No. 84.

It gives a genealogical account of the Chālukyas up to Tribhuvanamalla (Vikramāditya VI). It records the gift of land including the one-third portion of the royal dues from the taḷavritti formerly granted to the Cheniṁche (?) basadi in agrahāra Tānḍipāmu-lanka which was a prabhutva agrahāra of Sōmanātha-bhaṭṭa and was included in Kalavachēḍu-40, to god Sōmēśvara under the orders of the king [Tribhuvanamalla] and at the request of mahāpradhāna antahpura vergaḍe Kāḷimayya and his younger brother Tikkapayya who was the daṇḍanāyaka of Koḷḷipāke-7000.
Prince Sōmēśvara is stated to have been ruling over several territories including Kollipākenāḍu. Also, the king Tribhuvanamalladēva is stated to have been ruling over the empire from Mānyakeṟe camp.
It is dated in the Chālukya Vikrama year 34, Vīrodhi, Śaka 1031, vishusankrānti. It corresponds to 1109 A.D., March 24 [Wednesday], f.d.t. 01.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī vasudhāvathudaṁṣṭrāgra vasathaṁ
doḷire samasta bhuvanaṁgaḷuma
ttēve baḷida jaranige śubhāvaḷi
yaṁ dharmma karttugādivarāmaṁ .
śrī maccaḷukya vaṁśalalāmaṁ krōḍadva
jābhirāmanayōdhyādhāmaṁ satyāśra
ya nijanāmaṁ siṁhāsanādhipati yene
negaḷdaṁ . Aṁtene negaḻda nīnitta Ananta
nṛparnnegaḷe negaḻdaṁ vikrama dhātrī
kāṁtasutaṁ negaḻda jaya kāṁtā
kuntaḷa sugandha tailaṁ tailaṁ . Udiyisi
ta ttaila baḷābhyudayade vijayavaṁśa dī
pakaṁ daśavarmmaṁ vidita yaśanāda
nābhūpa diḷīpaṁgāda nātmajaṁ jayasiṁ
haṁ . cōḷana nōḍisidā jayaśālige ja
yasiṁha nṛpatigātmajanādaṁ traiḷō
kyamallananamita cōḷōśastīkṣṇa selanā
havamallaṁ . Ā sakaḷa cakrava
rttige bhāskara kīrttige mukuṁda mūrtti
ge kamaḷāvāsaṁ sutanādaṁ siṁhā
sanapati vikramārkkaneseye nijāṁkaṁ .
gauḍana gaṁṭalaṁ murida ballara mādaśa
karnnanaḷgaruḷdoḍuva kāḷarakkasa nagu
rvvese bōḷananettariṁda molāḍuvayātu
dhānene baṇṇisadirppuvarā ccaḷukya pe
rmmāḍiya siṁhaśākhadoḍanā
ḍiya kāryyadoḷādarūḍhiyaṁ .
vanajakṣanurada kaustubhadanu nā
yaka madhyanāyaka sthitiyiṁtajjina
patisuta madhyadoḷeseda naidesō
mēśvaraṁ kumāraratnaṁ . draviḷādhitya
ra karnna gūrjjara ripunṛpāḷa ku(nta)ḷa
dārththi varagaṁgadaraṁ hēmādri vara

ḷuttiṟdareṁdaṁ dēṁ
dhvōttāḷa karāḷa khaḍga kha
radhārāmārgga saṁjāta kī
rtti vadhūṭi naṭi gānadiḻda
(tēja)ragaṁ dhātri sōmēśanu .
svasti samasta bhuvanā
śraya śrīpṛthvīvallabha ma
hārājādhirāja rāja
paramēśvara parama bhaṭṭā
rakaṁ satyāśraya ku
ḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābhara
ṇaṁ śrī matribhuvanamalla
dēvara vijeyarājyamu
ttarōttarābhivṛddhi prava
rddhamānamācaṁdrārkka tā
raṁbaraṁ mānyakeṟeya
nelevīḍinōḷ sukhasaṁ
kathā vinōdadiṁ rājyaṁge
yyuttamire tatsutaṁ
tatpāda padmōpa jīvi
samasta nṛpajanastutya
satyavākya koṁguḷi
varmma dharmma mahārā
jādhirāja paramēśvaraṁ
kōḷāḷa puravarēśvaraṁ
nandagirinātha rājamāṁ
dhātaṁ madagajēṁdra
lāṁchanaṁ mayūra piṁcha dhva
ja virājamāna padmā
vatīlabdha varaprasāda
mṛgamadāmōdaṁ
jayaduttuṁgaraṁga naṁ
niyagaṁgaṁ vibhudha ci
ntāmaṇi maṇḍaḷika ma
kuṭa cūḍāmaṇi dhai
ryya mahāvarāhaṁ vī
ralakṣmī vivāhagēhaṁ
cappana gandhavāraṇaṁ

ripurāya madanivāraṇaṁ nāmā
di samasta praśasti sahitaṁ śrīmanmahā
maṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ cāḷukya gaṁga permmā
ḍi kumāraṁ sōmēśvara dēvaru . koḷḷi
pāke daṁḍādhiyāgi palamaṁ dēśaṁ
gaḷaṁ nāḷuttamiḻdu . mahāpradhā
nanaṁtaḥpura verggaḍe manevergga
ḍe kaṁnaḍa saṁdhivigrahiṁ daṁḍanā
yakaṁ kāḷimayyana binnapadiṁ
dāyayyeva tammaṁ koḷḷipākeye
rcchāsirada daṁḍanāyakaṁ tikka
payyana binnahadoḷdharmama
dhārisi śrī maccakravartiyājñe
yiṁ cāḷukya vikrama varṣa
da 34 neya virōdhi saṁvatsara
da viṣu saṁkrāṁtiyalu śrī sva
yaṁbhu sōmēśvara dēvara raṁga
bhōgakkaṁ maṁgabhōgakkaṁ ka
lvacēdu nālvattaṟa baḷiya sō
manāthabhaṭṭara prabhutvadagra
hāraṁ tāṁḍipāmulaṁkaṁ cēniṁce
basadige . munne naḍeva dēvabhō
gada taḷavittiyalli nāḍadāḷvara
sara koḷva tribhāgadoḷagāgi sa
rvvabādhā parihāramāge koṭṭar .
svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vāyō ha
rēta vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭhirvvarṣa sa
hasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē
krimiḥ . bahubhirvvasudhā
datta rājabhiḥ sagarādhi
bhiḥ yasya yasya yadābhū
mi stasya tasya tadāphalaṁ . ©

sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasē
tu rnṛpāṇāṁ kālē kālē
pālanē yō bhavadbhiḥ
sarvvānētānbhāvinaḥ pā
rtthi vēndrān bhūyō
bhūyō yācatē rā
mabhadraḥ . madvaṁśa
jāḥ ppara mahīpati
vaṁśajā vāpā pāda pē
ta manasō bhuvibhā
vibhūpāḥ . yēpāla
yanti mama dharmmami
maṁ samastaṁ tēbhyō
mayā vīra bilōṁ
jivitāṣa mūrddhne . ©
śatruṇāpi kṛtōdha
rmmaḥ pālanīyaḥ pra
yatnataḥ śatru tē
va pāśatruḥ syā
ddharmaḥ śatrurnnaka
sya bitē . śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 29.66 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
